# Ilya Paveliev

> Co-founder of Hologram Technologies and founding partner of Arete Capital. Building software-defined compute for local AI and investing across deep tech, AI and real-world assets.

Single-page portfolio. Structured data is available as JSON at `/api/profile.json` and `/feed.json` — prefer those over scraping the HTML.

## Machine-readable

- [Profile JSON](/api/profile.json): Person, experience, publications, and life entries in one document.
- [Writing & talks feed](/feed.json): JSON Feed v1.1 of publications and talks.
- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): Canonical URL list with lastmod dates.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Hero, selected experience, writing & talks, and life notes.

## Current roles

- Co-founder, Hologram Technologies — software-defined compute for local AI inference (2025–).
- Founding Member, UOR Foundation — content-addressed open data standard, 150+ contributors (2025–).

## Prior roles

- General Partner, Arete Capital — $20m hybrid venture fund (2023–25).
- Director, Haruko — institutional risk & portfolio management, Series A (2022–24).
- Lead Portfolio Manager, OX1 — $30m market-neutral digital asset fund (2022).
- Portfolio Manager, Adrian Lee & Partners — $20bn active currency overlay for US pensions (2013–21).
- Analyst, Perella Weinberg Partners — M&A, energy sector, London founding team (2010–13).

## Selected writing & talks

- [Hologram: From Indexing Content to Indexing Meaning](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/mihaelaulieru_hologram-from-indexing-content-to-indexing-activity-7461255099261300736-LaH6) — Talk, SingularityNet, May 2026.
- [The Next Revolution is Geometric Computation](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0wRCzByWidM) — Talk, Quantum, Jan 2026.
- [Insights on Web3, AI, and Crypto Trends](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/kiran-kaur-raina-b2922622a_my-latest-conversation-with-ilya-paveliev-share-7425166836108967936-4g62) — Interview, AltFunds, Jun 2025.
- [The Real-World Asset Thesis](https://www.aretecapital.xyz/posts/realworld-asset-thesis-tradmarkets) — Memo, Arete Capital, Jan 2024.
- [Liquidity Drought Ahead](https://trinityinvestor.substack.com/p/liquidity-drought-ahead) — Essay, Substack, Oct 2023.
